name: Eggs and Chorizo Wraps
method: Take a large skillet and cook the chorizo. Keep the heat medium until
it is cooked. Drain and put it back to the pan.
Take a bowl, and whisk milk and eggs until blended.
Pour egg mixture into chorizo. Stir continuously until eggs are
Place 1/2 cup mixture in each tortilla.
Then add onion, cilantro, and salsa. Fold the tortilla and roll-up.
